titleStmt.title: SII 28.26: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 26. (A.R. No. 26 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: ŚrI-Vīrapratāparāya Dēvarāya-mahārāya (II) Śaka 1361, Siddhārthi, Makara ba. Monday, Swāti, Irregular.
p.note: A.R.Ep., 1914, p. 62, Taking Swāti as a mistake for Śrāvaṇa the details have been equated to 1440 A.D., February 1. But on that day, even Śravaṇa was only f.d.n. ·45 (L.D.S. Pillai, Indian Ephemeries, Vol. V).

summary.p: The record credits the king with the title gaja-vēṭṭai-rāyan.

This damaged inscription seems to register the grant of a village to God Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟai-uḍaiyār-Kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyanār in Viṭṭapaṟṟu-Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Irāśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu by Tēvaṇa-nāyakkar for the health (tirumēnikku naṉṟāga) of Dakshiṇa-samudrādhipati Ilakkaṇṇa-Daṇṇāyakka-Uḍaiyāṟ. Mentions Śivarātri-puṇyakālam, in this connection but apparently this auspicious occasion had no link with the date of the record, as even the monthly Śivarātri (the fourteenth day of the dark fortnight) in the month of Makara can never coincide with the asterism svāti and the Mahāśivarātri is observed only in the lunar month Māgha. So the record seems to have been officially issued earlier to cater for the delays in the process of giving effect to the order.
1. ṟṟu is written below the line.
2. ṭṭa is written below the line.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran hariyarāya
vipāṭan pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan mūvarā
yar kaṇṭan kaṇṭanāḍu koṇḍu koṇḍanāḍu kuṭātān gaja
veṭṭairāyan śrīvīrapratāparāya devarāya mahārāyan pṛdhuvirā
jyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakāptam 1000 3 100 6 10 1l mel cellā niṉṟa
siddhārtdhi samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparakṣattu so
ma vāramum peṟṟa śoti nakṣatrattu nāḷ vaṭakarai Irāciṅkavaḷa nāṭṭu
viṭṭapaṟṟu Ukaḷūr kūṟṟattu tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam po
ṟuttaruḷiya nāyaṉāṟku śrīmatu tevanāyakkar dakṣiṇa samudrādhipati
Ilakkaṇṇa teṇṇāyakka Uṭaiyār tirumeṉikku naṉṟākaveṇum E
ṉṟu śivarātri puṇya kālattile Uttuṅkatuṅka vaḷanā
laikuḷpa veṇma
ṇik ku teṉpāṟkellai māttūr kuṉṟattukku vaṭakkumel
Aṉtūrapāvāy Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai pāvā
ykku teṟku Inṉāḷkellai nañcey puṉcey māvaṭai mara
vaṭai kuḷavaṭai Eri vāykkāl vāṉpayir puṉpayir cekkāyam tarikai
ma Epperppiṭṭa mutalu
candrādityavaraiyum cella kalveṭṭikuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār kuṟṟa
m poṟuttaruḷiya nāyaṉārkku tevaṇanāyakkareṉ Iṉta taṉmattu
kku Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kapilaip pacuvaik koṉṟavaṉ
Digital edition of SII 28.26 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
